name: Deviled Steak Cubes
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Stew Beef or Sirloin, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Coat meat in the seasoned mixture and brown slowly in oil.
3. Add remaining ingredients; cover and simmer for 1 1/2 to 2 hours or until tender.
4. Serve over rice or noodles.
Serves: 4
